Overrides.Override: Nova Spells Cast at a Marked target instead of around you if possible Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Novamark
20% chance for Skills to not consume a Cooldown on use Limited to 1 Runegraft of Time
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
+1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft
